description: Static assets served without Cache-Control, so the edge applies weak heuristics or doesn't cache, hammering the origin.
body: Failure mode: cacheable static content ships with no explicit Cache-Control, so the CDN either refuses to cache or uses short heuristic TTLs, sending most requests to origin. Detection signals: low hit ratio on static assets; high origin request rate; absent cache headers. Do not rely on heuristic caching for assets you control. Safer fallback: set explicit s-maxage (long for fingerprinted assets) and surrogate keys, and verify the edge reports HIT.
